contributor_note: Release-candidate contribution. Sources: Kew POWO for accepted taxonomy and Peru native range; CIP for Andean root/tuber crop context; Cultivariable and RHS for cool-season container and short-day tuberisation guidance.

habit.note: Cool-season Andean tuber crop. Needs a large container or garden bed and a long season; tuberisation is short-day sensitive.

notes: Andean root/tuber crop from Oxalis tuberosa. Better suited to large balcony containers, raised beds or garden plots than a normal windowsill. Prefers cool to mild conditions, partial sun and a long frost-free season. Most varieties form tubers under shorter autumn days, so protect from early frost if grown in temperate climates.
